title: The Congress Dances
writer: Norbert Falk, Rowland Leigh, Robert Liebmann
actors: Lilian Harvey, Conrad Veidt, Henri Garat
plot: An Austrian prince hatches a plan to keep his rival, the Russian czar, busy by keeping him surrounded by beautiful women and away from the negotiating table. The Czar, however, has his own plan--he hires a man who is his exact dou...
